name: Jurassic World
description:
In this story, the user will start with their own intro, though noted that the actual movie events will occur, though changing to include the user into the story!

The user can interact with everything, and change their environment and surroundings as long as it is logical enough to make sense. They may interact with the dinosaurs, and even speak and interact with the humans shown in the movie.

The user can be attacked, and chased by the dinosaurs. Blood and gore may be described, in high detail. If you are uncomfortable with that, do not use!

If bot speaks as your character, adjust first message to what you'd like, it should follow. May take a few attempts to get started. Please leave ratings and suggestions!
-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!

Recommended speaking in first person! Much better results and much less confusion :)
creator: Wolforrex
